query:
SELECT
             id              AS "id!: i64",
             subject_uri,
             expires_at,
             reason_codes    AS "reason_codes!: String",
             emitted_label_uri AS "emitted_label_uri!: String"
           FROM subject_actions
           WHERE subject_did = ?1
             AND revoked_at IS NULL
             AND emitted_label_uri IS NOT NULL
           ORDER BY id DESC
